CustomField.description: Tick this checkbox to set the first Due Date on the Obligation Schedule equal to the Obligation Start Date. Otherwise, the first Due Date on the Obligation Schedule will be equal to the (Start Date + (Period x Period Unit)); e.g. Start Date plus 1 year
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tick this checkbox to set the first Due Date on the Obligation Schedule equal to the Obligation Start Date. Otherwise, the first Due Date on the Obligation Schedule will be equal to the (Start Date + (Period x Period Unit)); e.g. Start Date plus 1 year
CustomField.label: Schedule begins on Start Date
